title: Watts
content:
{{Top|canon=Blanaid}} {{Youmay|a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]|[[Robert Watts]], real-life producer and character namesake}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:Watts.jpg]] |name=Watts |homeworld=[[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]]{{CCG|set=Endor Limited|cardname=Lieutenant Watts}} |birth= |death=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]{{Film|VI}} |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height=1.78 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]''[[Star Wars: Head-to-Head Tag Teams]]'' |mass=70 [[Kilogram/Legends|kilograms]] |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] ***[[Tempest Force/Legends|Tempest Force]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Look!''"
"''Get him off of there!|Watts and Marquand, upon spotting an Ewok assailant on top of their AT-ST|}} [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Watts''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]] and an officer who served as an [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] gunner in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. He was a crack shot, as his gunnery skills were able to produce "devastating results." ==Biography== Prior to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], Watts, a member of the Imperial Army, was temporarily assigned to the [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] to help develop [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]] weaponry. [[File:Chewbacca_TCG_2016_Store_Championship_Kit_Card.png|thumb|left|180px|Chewbacca tosses Watts overboard]] Eventually, by 4 ABY, Watts joined [[Tempest Force/Legends|Tempest Force]] and served under [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Marquand/Legends|Marquand]] as the gunner of [[Tempest Scout 2/Legends|Tempest Scout 2]] during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. When [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] and two [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] landed on Tempest Scout 2, Marquand ordered Watts to get the only Ewok he was aware of off their AT-ST. Watts peered out of the cockpit hatchway and was pulled out by the powerful Chewbacca, who threw him overboard, screaming during most of his 8.6-meter plummet to the ground which resulted in his death. The Imperials, not knowing about his demise, later believed that Watts, alongside Marquand, had turned traitor when it became apparent that their walker was committing turncoat actions against them.''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' ==Behind the scenes== Watts was played by his namesake, ''Return of the Jedi'' co-producer [[Robert Watts]]. Watts served in real-world armed forces, during which he obtained the rank of lieutenant.[[Star Wars Insider 101|''Star Wars Insider'' 101]] The character was originally supposed to be [[General/Legends|General]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Maximilian Veers]], and [[Julian Glover]] was invited to reprise his role from [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']]. However, due to scheduling conflicts, Glover wasn't available on the day of filming, and Watts took over the part.[[The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine 10|''The Lucasfilm Fan Club Magazine'' 10]] ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' {{C|Cutscene only}} *{{Film|VI}} {{1st}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Watts}} *''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' {{ID|AT-ST Gunner}} {{CardGameSet|set={{CCG|set=Endor Limited|parent=1}} {{1stID|Watts}}|cards= *{{CCG|set=Endor Limited|cardname=Lieutenant Watts}} *{{CCG|set=Endor Limited|cardname=Major Marquand}} }} *{{InsiderCite|101|Watts the Story|reprint=1}} *{{InsiderCite|105|25 Years of Return of the Jedi!|25 Years of ''Return of the Jedi''!|reprint=1}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Star Wars: Head-to-Head Tag Teams]]'' *{{InsiderCite|160|Back on Set!}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Watts |nl=Blanaid |uk=Воттс }} [[Category:Corulag residents]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Army officers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Imperial Army pilots]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Tempest Force members]]
